text:
Name: Ardi Pratama

Professional Summary:
Backend-oriented software engineer with experience in API development, automation, and machine learning projects. Interested in scalable systems, data processing, and practical AI applications. Comfortable working with Python-based tools and Linux environments.

Technical Skills:
Programming Languages:
- Python
- C++
- SQL (basic)

Frameworks / Backend:
- FastAPI
- Flask
- REST API development

Machine Learning & Data:
- scikit-learn
- TensorFlow (basic understanding)
- Pandas
- NumPy
- Data preprocessing
- Feature engineering

Tools & Platforms:
- Git
- Linux
- JSON / CSV processing
- Postman

Soft Skills:
- Problem-solving
- Analytical thinking
- Team collaboration
- Communication
- Adaptability
- Time management
- Attention to detail
- Continuous learning

Languages:
- Indonesian (Native)
- English (Professional Working Proficiency)

Experience:
Backend Developer Intern
PT Solusi Data Nusantara
Jan 2024 – Jun 2024

Responsibilities:
- Developed internal REST APIs using FastAPI
- Created endpoints for data retrieval, filtering, and processing
- Worked with JSON request/response workflows
- Assisted debugging backend service issues
- Collaborated with senior developers for feature integration

Achievements:
- Reduced manual reporting process by automating API-based data retrieval
- Improved response structure consistency across several endpoints

Projects:

Personal ML Classification Project
- Built a machine learning classification pipeline using scikit-learn
- Performed preprocessing, feature cleaning, and label preparation
- Evaluated model performance using precision, recall, and F1-score
- Compared Logistic Regression and Random Forest models

Automation & Data Processing Scripts
- Created Python scripts for automated data collection and cleaning
- Processed CSV and JSON datasets from multiple sources
- Built reusable scripts for formatting and validation

Mini API Service Project
- Built a small Flask-based API service for testing prediction requests
- Implemented basic request validation and logging
- Tested endpoints using Postman

Education:
Bachelor of Electrical Engineering

Additional Information:
- Familiar with Linux command line workflows
- Interested in AI engineering and backend systems
- Experience using Git for version control
